title: chainbench slice of the agent-facing MCP contract (C1)
description: The chainbench_* tools the coding-agent evaluator depends on, by exact registered name. This is the chainbench-owned fragment of the canonical coding-agent/contract/agent-mcp.schema.json (authored by the coding-agent repo). contract.test.ts asserts the server registers every tool below by name and that each tool's input field names + required set match. The chainbench_report output is the C4 report shape (documented under `output`); that JSON shape is exercised by report.test.ts and tests/unit/tests/cmd-report-format.sh rather than the registration check, because the tool's output is untyped text at the MCP boundary.

output.$comment: C4 report shape when format=json. Verified by report.test.ts + cmd-report-format.sh, not by the registration check.
